empresas-acordos-sindicais.description: This dataset aggregates indicators related to companies' social engagement, including aspects associated with accessibility, workforce diversity, and the relationship between the highest and lowest salaries, with metrics derived from inference models applied to public or publicly accessible information. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the ESG documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-anuncios-online.description: This dataset gathers information about online advertisements associated with the company being consulted, based on the identification of seller profiles on portals and marketplaces focused on buying and selling between individuals. It includes consolidated data from the identified profiles and metrics related to advertising activity, and there may be more than one profile associated with the same company. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.

empresas-avaliacoes-e-reputacao.description: This dataset gathers information about a company's reputation across various service review platforms, presenting indicators by source, a consolidated view of its reputation, and a historical overview of its evolution over time. This data supports risk analysis, company valuation, and can be used as input in analytical and statistical models. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Reputation documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-consciencia-social.description: This dataset aggregates indicators related to companies' social engagement, including aspects associated with accessibility, workforce diversity, and the relationship between the highest and lowest salaries, with metrics derived from inference models applied to public or publicly accessible information. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the ESG documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-dados-de-categoria-comercial-mc.description: This dataset returns the business categorization of the queried company based on the MCC (Merchant Category Code), a four-digit numeric code used in the payment processing ecosystem to classify companies according to the type of goods or services offered. The return may include direct MCC associations when available, as well as associations inferred from the company's CNAE codes. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-dados-de-distribuicao-de-proces.description: This dataset gathers aggregated data on the distribution of legal proceedings involving the partners of the consulted entity, consolidating indicators derived from the main fields of the Legal Proceedings dataset. The result provides a summary view of the volume and nature of the proceedings associated with the partners, facilitating preliminary analyses without the need to evaluate individual records on a large scale. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.

empresas-dados-de-distribuicao-de-proces.description: This dataset consolidates aggregated information about legal proceedings in which the consulted entity is involved, allowing for a quick overview of the distribution of these proceedings across different dimensions, such as type, court, state, status, and party role. The return is based on the main fields of the Legal Proceedings dataset, making it suitable for exploratory analyses and preliminary assessments, without the need to consume large volumes of detailed data. Distribution values ​​are aggregated in real time, prioritizing the most recent data. In cases of entities with more than 500,000 proceedings, the return may be empty, accompanied by an error. UNABLE TO AGGREGATE DATA IN TIME (code -1215). For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.
priceTable: By specifying this parameter, an additional object will be returned in the dataset output, which refers to the aggregation based on the values ​​of the field specified in this parameter.

filters.description: Subject number or name in the CNJ. When numeric values are used, this filter applies to the InferredCNJSubjectNumber and InferredBroadCNJSubjectNumber fields. In case of text values, it applies to the InferredCNJSubjectName and InferredBroadCNJSubjectName fields.

Number or name of the process type in the CNJ. When numbers are entered, the filter is applied to the InferredCNJProcedureTypeNumber field, and if they are texts, it is applied to the InferredCNJProcedureTypeName field.

empresas-dados-de-fundos-de-investimento.description: This dataset compiles registration and operational information on investment funds associated with the consulted entity, according to records available from the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission (CVM). The return includes basic fund data and consolidated transaction information, when available, allowing for sectoral analyses related to the company's performance in the investment market. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Sectoral documentation.
priceTable: This determines whether all captured transactions for the CNPJ (Brazilian tax ID) should be returned, potentially directly impacting the volume and performance of the response.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-dados-de-obras-civis.description: This dataset compiles registration information on construction projects linked to the consulted entity, based on records available in the National Construction Project Registry (CNO). The results include essential data for identifying and monitoring the projects, such as the CNO number, address, constructed area, and registration status, supporting sectoral analyses and compliance with regulatory and tax obligations. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Sectoral documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-dados-de-registro.description: This dataset compiles registration and contact information associated with the company being consulted, with data typically required in registration, validation, and business relationship processes. The return includes basic identification and status information of the company, as well as records of emails, phone numbers, and addresses available from the sources. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-dados-de-sites.description: This dataset gathers historical and aggregated information about websites associated with the consulted entity, considering recurring captures made over time, including metrics on the number of related websites and domains, as well as associations between entities, domains, and, in the case of companies, websites linked to partners. The return considers websites as distinct units, meaning a single domain can contain multiple websites and a single website can be distributed across different domains. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.

empresas-devedores-do-governo.description: This dataset compiles information on taxpayers registered as principal debtors in outstanding debts to the Federal Government and the FGTS (Brazilian Severance Indemnity Fund), according to the most recent records made available by the Attorney General's Office of the National Treasury (PGFN). The return details the outstanding debts associated with the consulted entity, serving as a more agile alternative to on-demand certificate requests, with the caveat that, since it is periodic data, the information may not reflect very recent updates. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-doacoes-eleitorais-de-socios.description: This dataset gathers information on donations made to election campaigns by members linked to the consulted CNPJ (Brazilian tax ID), including individual donation records and aggregate indicators related to the quantity and total value donated, allowing for analyses of indirect political involvement and associations between entities, members, and political agents. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-doacoes-eleitorais.description: This dataset compiles information on donations made to election campaigns by the consulted entity, including individual donation records and aggregate indicators related to the quantity and total value donated, allowing for analyses of political involvement and associations between entities and political agents throughout the considered election cycles. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-e-mails-de-pessoas-relacionadas.description: This dataset compiles emails associated with individuals related to the company being consulted, considering links such as partners, administrators, employees, and other types of relationships identified in the people and companies graph. The result includes a list of emails linked to these individuals, along with attributes describing the type of relationship, email characteristics, validation status, recency, and priority, supporting contact, relationship, and risk analyses. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

empresas-e-mails.description: This dataset gathers information on emails associated with the company being consulted, including individual characteristics of each address and aggregated indicators about the set of identified emails. The results allow for the evaluation of attributes such as email type, validation status, recency, priority, and volume of occurrences, supporting contact analysis, database quality, risk assessment, and data modeling. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

empresas-enderecos-de-pessoas-relacionad.description: This dataset returns addresses associated with individuals related to the queried company, regardless of whether the address is directly linked to the company's tax ID (CNPJ). The return includes a list of identified addresses, attributes describing each address, and the type of relationship of the associated individual. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

empresas-enderecos.description: This dataset compiles addresses associated with the consulted company, including aggregated information and attributes that describe address characteristics such as recency, priority, activity status, and type of affiliation. The result considers the consolidation of similar addresses through building code identifiers, allowing for more consistent analyses and reducing duplication in data modeling and enrichment scenarios. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-envolvimento-politico.description: This dataset aggregates information related to the political involvement of the company's shareholders, including participation in election campaigns, history of candidacies, and holding public office, in addition to a normalized consolidated score that allows for the relative classification of individuals associated with the company. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-evolucao-da-empresa.description: This dataset presents the temporal evolution of a company's registration and structural information, including variations in share capital, number of employees, and number of partners over time, allowing for historical analysis and use in analytical and risk models. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please consult the Economic documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-exposicao-e-perfil-na-midia.description: This dataset gathers information about the public exposure of entities in open media sources, including associated journalistic content, aggregated indicators of visibility and the nature of the exposure, as well as sentiment analysis of the identified mentions. The returned news items are associated with the consulted entity through contextual inference based on the name identified in the content and, when provided, on the keywords submitted in the query. Less precise associations may occur in cases of very common or generic names, considering that the publications do not use formal identifiers such as CNPJ (Brazilian tax ID). For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.
priceTable: Allows you to restrict the returned content based on specific keywords, separated by commas.
Define the logic for combining the given keywords.

filters.description: Name of the source responsible for the news

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-historico-de-dados-basicos.description: This dataset compiles the historical changes to basic registration information associated with the consulted CNPJ (Brazilian taxpayer ID), as captured over time by BigDataCorp. It includes records of changes to data such as company name, tax regime, and CNAE (Brazilian National Classification of Economic Activities), as well as aggregated information that assists in analyzing the evolution of the company's registration data. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please consult the Basic Data documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-indicadores-de-atividade.description: This dataset gathers indicators related to a company's activity level, including revenue estimates, number of employees, activity level, and operational signals such as digital presence, recurrence of registration information, and attributes derived from CNPJ (Brazilian company tax ID) transactions, combining statistical inferences and objective indicators. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, consult the Economic documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-influencia-do-quadro-societario.description: This dataset infers the level of influence of the shareholder structure of the company being consulted, considering in an integrated way aspects such as the exposure and profile of the shareholders in the media, political involvement and history of lawsuits, allowing the evaluation of the potential impact of the company's shareholders in the social and institutional context. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-marketplaces.description: This dataset gathers information about a company's presence in online marketplaces selling products, considering both aggregate indicators and details of its performance in each individual marketplace where the company was identified. The data reflects the existence of active profiles, product categories sold, and metrics associated with the company's performance in these digital environments. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.
priceTable: Total number of products sold on the marketplace

bodyParams.name: Limit

empresas-mercado-financeiro.description: This dataset gathers financial and corporate information on publicly traded companies, based on public data provided by regulatory bodies and capital market entities. The results include information such as balance sheet, financial performance, main shareholders, and shareholding structure. The absence of results indicates that the company consulted does not have shares traded on the stock exchange. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Sectoral documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-premios-e-certificacoes.description: This dataset gathers aggregated and detailed information about awards and certifications obtained by the consulted entity, encompassing recognition from different spheres of activity, such as governmental, academic, private, national or international awards, as well as professional, technical, security or compliance certifications. The data allows for the evaluation of institutional recognition, reputational positioning, and formal attributes associated with the entity's performance. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Reputation documentation.
priceTable: Name of the organization that awarded the prize.

filters.values: Any name or part of the name of the award.

filters.values: Any name or part of the name of the certification

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-presenca-em-cobranca.description: This dataset indicates whether the company being consulted has been involved in or has been involved in debt collection processes, based on the identification of instances of contact, attempted collection, or exposure to credit recovery mechanisms. The return does not provide information on the debt amount, the creditor, or the nature of the obligation, only the existence of the collection process within a specific period. In addition to the total number of occurrences, the dataset provides consolidated temporal indicators, such as the number of consecutive months in collection and the volume of occurrences in the last 3, 6, and 12 months. All temporal indicators are calculated dynamically based on the query's reference date, when provided. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-prestadores-de-servicos-eleitor.description: Dataset que reúne informações sobre contratos e licitações firmados por políticos e partidos com prestadores de serviços eleitorais, incluindo registros de fornecimento, valores contratados e vínculos associados às campanhas, permitindo análises de relacionamento e envolvimento político entre entidades e agentes políticos. Os dados retornados contemplam tanto prestações de serviço realizadas quanto recebidas pela entidade consultada, cuja interpretação depende da comparação entre o nome da entidade consultada e o valor informado no campo PoliticianFullName. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-processos-judiciais-dos-socios.description: This dataset returns information about legal and administrative proceedings involving the partners of the consulted company, following the same data structure, filters, parameters, and interpretation rules applied to the standard Legal and Administrative Proceedings dataset of the Companies API. The difference lies exclusively in the scope of the query, which considers corporate relationships instead of the directly consulted entity. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.
priceTable: It determines whether process movements should be returned, directly impacting the response volume.

empresas-propriedades-industriais-de-fun.description: This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with employees linked to the company being consulted, returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial property per employee, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-propriedades-industriais-de-soc.description: This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with partners linked to the company being consulted, returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial properties per partner, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-propriedades-industriais.description: This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with the consulted CNPJ (Brazilian taxpayer ID), returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial properties, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-qsa-de-recencia-configuravel.description: This dataset returns basic registration information of the consulted company and the composition of its shareholder structure (QSA), combining internal data from BigDataCorp with official information from the Federal Revenue Service. The dataset allows defining a minimum recency criterion for the shareholder data, performing dynamic re-evaluation of official sources when the available information does not meet the specified update level. When the identification documents of the partners are not explicitly available in official sources, the dataset can apply inferences based on the name of the related entity, returning the document only when the association is considered sufficiently accurate. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.
priceTable: Defines the maximum number of days since the last update of the QSA data. If the available data is older than the specified value, official sources are re-evaluated in real time to obtain the most recent information possible.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-relacionamentos-do-grupo-econom.description: This dataset returns information about entities—individuals and companies—that are part of the same economic group as the consulted entity, considering exclusively corporate ties. The return includes direct and indirect relationships that make up the structure of the economic group, and may result in large volumes of data due to the corporate complexity involved. When the Federal Revenue Service does not have information about the shareholding structure of the subsidiary being consulted, the relationships are built from the shareholding structure of the parent company . For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.
priceTable: It defines the level of the economic group up to which relationships should be considered. Level 1 corresponds to direct relationships.
Indicates whether the extended economic group should be returned, including relatives and companies associated with the people in the group.
It limits the maximum number of relationships returned, directly impacting query performance.
Indicates whether relationships should be built from the matrix document.

filters.description: Type of document from the related entity
Level of relationship within the economic group

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

empresas-relacionamentos.description: This dataset returns information about entities related to the queried company, including individuals and legal entities associated through corporate ties, control, legal representation, or functional relationships. The return consolidates aggregated data and detailed lists of relationships, allowing for structured analysis of the company's network of connections. When information about a subsidiary's shareholding structure is not available from the Federal Revenue Service, relationships can be built based on data from the parent company, ensuring the continuity and consistency of the returned relational structure. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.
priceTable: Defines whether relationships should be built from data in the matrix of the consulted company.

filters.description: Type of document from the related entity

bodyParams.name: Limit

empresas-telefones-de-pessoas-relacionad.description: A dataset that gathers phone numbers associated with individuals related to the consulted entity, regardless of any direct link to the entity itself, allowing for broader contact analysis based on corporate, functional, or administrative relationships. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

empresas-telefones.description: This dataset returns addresses associated with the queried company, including aggregated information and indicators that aid in contact analysis, recency, and relevance. Addresses can be unified using the building code (BuildCode), allowing for the consolidation of similar records and improving the analytical quality of the results. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

enderecos-amazonia-legal.description: This dataset identifies whether a given address or geographic area is located within, crosses, or is near the Legal Amazon region, according to the current geopolitical delimitation. The data provided supports risk analysis, environmental compliance, and validation of economic or contractual activities subject to territorial and environmental restrictions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

enderecos-areas-de-protecao-ambiental.description: This dataset returns information about environmental protection areas located within, overlapping, or near the consulted geographic area, indicating the existence and spatial relationship between the reported location and officially protected areas. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the documentation. Environmental and Cultural Protection. Technical name of the dataset: environmental_preservation_areas.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

enderecos-consulta-de-areas-embargadas-i.description: Dataset que identifica se uma área geográfica informada encontra-se dentro, cruza ou está próxima de áreas embargadas por órgãos ambientais, indicando a existência de sanções administrativas aplicadas para proteção e recuperação ambiental. O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance ambiental e validação de atividades econômicas ou contratuais sujeitas a restrições ambientais. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the documentation. Environmental and Cultural Protection. Technical name of the dataset: embargoed_areas.

enderecos-consulta-de-reservas-legais-si.description: Dataset que identifica se uma área geográfica informada encontra-se dentro, cruza ou está próxima de áreas classificadas como Reserva Legal, conforme registros do Cadastro Ambiental Rural (CAR). O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance ambiental e validação de atividades econômicas ou contratuais sujeitas a restrições de uso sustentável do território. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

enderecos-dados-de-empresas-nas-proximid.description: This dataset returns a list of companies located near a specified geographic region, considering latitude and longitude coordinates, search radius, and additional filtering criteria. The return includes basic information about the companies found and aggregated indicators for the region consulted, allowing for territorial, sectoral, and economic density analyses. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic Activity documentation.

enderecos-dados-de-propriedades-rurais-s.description: This dataset returns data on rural properties registered in the Rural Environmental Registry System (SICAR), based on the CAR (Rural Environmental Registry) number provided. The CAR is a national, mandatory, electronic public registry for rural properties that compiles declared environmental information about the property or possession, including permanent preservation areas (APP), restricted use areas, legal reserves, remnants of native vegetation, and consolidated areas. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Rural Properties documentation.

enderecos-enderecos-em-area-de-risco.description: This dataset identifies whether a given geographic point is located within or near defined areas that may present a public safety risk, according to official IBGE (Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics) data. The results support risk analysis, credit assessment, onboarding, logistics, and other location-sensitive decisions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk and Public Safety documentation.

enderecos-estatisticas-criminais.description: This dataset returns aggregated statistics on criminal occurrences recorded in a given city, including indicators related to crimes such as theft, robbery, homicide, kidnapping, and drug trafficking. The data allows for macro-level analyses of public safety and assessment of territorial risk associated with the consulted location. The query always considers the municipality as the unit of analysis, regardless of the geographic key provided. When a polygon encompasses more than one municipality, the returned data corresponds to the city closest to the centroid of the specified area. This dataset is only available for the states of São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, and Minas Gerais . For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk and Public Safety documentation.
priceTable: Explicit identification of the municipality to be analyzed.

enderecos-estatisticas-de-empresas.description: This dataset returns aggregated statistics on companies associated with a specific geographic region, based on a given address or postal code. The return consolidates indicators such as the number of active and inactive companies, total number of employees, aggregate revenue, declared share capital, and analytical distributions across different economic and registration dimensions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic Activity documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit

enderecos-municipios.description: This dataset returns basic information about Brazilian municipalities within a defined geographic area, based on the identification of overlap between the consulted region and the territorial boundaries of the municipalities. The return includes official identifiers, such as IBGE and SICOR codes, as well as the percentage of overlap of the consulted area in each identified municipality. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.
priceTable: Allows you to manually define the geographic search area using a longitude/latitude coordinate polygon, used to identify municipalities with overlapping areas.

enderecos-sitios-arqueologicos.description: Dataset que identifica a existência de sítios arqueológicos associados a uma área geográfica informada, indicando a presença, cruzamento ou proximidade desses sítios em relação à área analisada. O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance regulatório e validação de atividades sujeitas a restrições de preservação do patrimônio histórico e cultural. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

enderecos-terras-indigenas.description: This dataset identifies the proximity, intersection, or insertion of an address, point, or geographic area in relation to Indigenous lands, returning information associated with Indigenous lands related to the analyzed area. The data provided supports risk analysis, territorial compliance, and validation of activities subject to legal and socio-environmental restrictions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

The data provided supports risk analyses, environmental compliance, and validation of activities subject to legal and territorial restrictions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

enderecos-zoneamento-agroecologico.description: Dataset que retorna informações sobre o zoneamento agroecológico da região consultada, incluindo indicações de aptidão e restrições para diferentes usos agropecuários, como cultivo agrícola, pastagem e pecuária, conforme os dados oficiais disponíveis para a área analisada. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

pessoas-anuncios-online.description: This dataset gathers information about advertisements published by the individual in question on online peer-to-peer buying and selling portals and marketplaces. The results include advertiser profiles inferred from public information present in the advertisements; more than one profile may be associated with the same person, depending on the different portals and contexts identified. The data only represents the individual's activity as an informal seller and does not include marketplaces aimed at formal sellers. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.

pessoas-candidatos-eleitorais.description: This dataset gathers information on individuals' participation in current and historical elections, including general indicators of candidacy and election, as well as details of each electoral process, with registration data declared to the Electoral Court and campaign finance reports, covering income, donations, and associated expenses. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

pessoas-conselhos-de-classe.description: This dataset gathers information about the respondent's participation in professional councils, professional associations, and professional bodies. The results include aggregated indicators, such as the total number of identified affiliations, as well as details of each associated professional registration, allowing for analyses of performance, regularity, and history within professional entities. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

pessoas-dados-cadastrais-de-recencia-con.description: This dataset returns the basic registration data of the person being consulted, such as name, CPF (Brazilian tax identification number), date of birth, and parentage, with the possibility of configuring the maximum recency of the data from the Federal Revenue Service. If the available information does not meet the defined recency criterion, the dataset automatically performs a real-time re-evaluation of the official sources, allowing it to meet more stringent business rules and high data update requirements. For documents with the status "DECEASED OWNER", no dynamic updates are performed, regardless of the configured recency, since no future changes are expected in these records. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

pessoas-dados-de-distribuicao-de-process.description: This dataset provides aggregated data on legal proceedings involving first-degree relatives of the person being consulted. The result consolidates distribution indicators based on the main fields of the Legal Proceedings dataset, allowing for a summary view of the family's legal history for quick analysis, without the need to individually evaluate each identified proceeding. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.

The return is based on the main fields of the Legal Proceedings dataset, making it suitable for exploratory analyses and preliminary assessments, without the need to consume large volumes of detailed data. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.

pessoas-dados-de-popularidade.description: This dataset consolidates information related to individuals' public exposure in political, judicial, economic, social, and media contexts, allowing for analysis of the degree of influence exerted on society. The output includes a normalized influence score, which reflects the individual's level of public exposure, considering the relevance and scope of the different associated signals. For interpretation purposes, the higher the influence score, the greater the individual's public visibility and the potential reach of their actions or positions tend to be. The score composition takes into account, among other factors, political participation, and is adjusted according to the type and scope of the office being contested. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-dados-de-registro.description: This dataset returns registration data for the person being searched, gathering information commonly used in registration and profile enrichment processes, such as identification data, emails, addresses, and phone numbers associated with the individual. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit

pessoas-dados-de-sites.description: This dataset gathers information about websites associated with the consulted entity, considering recurring captures made over the last 24 months to compose a historical overview. The return includes aggregated data on the number of websites identified, the diversity of domains associated with the entity, and the association of different entities with the same domain. It is important to note that the dataset returns websites, not domains: a domain can contain multiple websites, just as a website can be distributed across more than one domain. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.

pessoas-dados-profissionais.description: This dataset returns aggregated and historical information about the professional activity of the person consulted. The return consolidates current and past work relationships, including records of formal employment and indications of informal professional activity, such as self-employment or service provision. The data is suitable for analyzing professional profiles, employment history, and evaluating a person's career path. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

pessoas-devedores-do-governo.description: This dataset provides information on taxpayers registered as primary debtors in outstanding debts to the Federal Government and the FGTS (Brazilian Severance Indemnity Fund), according to the most recent records made available by the PGFN (Attorney General's Office for the National Treasury). Because this is not an on-demand database, the data may be outdated, including debts that have already been paid or not reflecting recent additions. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic and Financial documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-doacoes-eleitorais.description: This dataset compiles information on electoral donations made and received by the consulted entity, including aggregated attributes of quantity and total value, as well as details of each donation, such as the politician involved, value, date, and indication of whether it was made digitally. For interpretation purposes, the data includes financial flows in both directions, allowing the identification of both donations made and received by the entity. When a reference date is provided in the query, the electoral cycles considered are counted retroactively from that date. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

pessoas-emails-de-pessoas-relacionadas.description: A dataset that returns emails associated with people related to the queried individual, with classification and validation attributes that support contact analysis, segmentation, and automated decision-making. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

The data supports relationship analysis, segmentation, and automated decision-making in flows that require enhanced contact context. pessoas-exposicao-e-perfil-na-midia.description: This dataset gathers information about individuals' public exposure in open media sources, including associated journalistic content, aggregated visibility indicators, and the nature of the exposure, as well as sentiment analysis of the identified mentions. The returned news items are associated with the queried entity through inference based on the name identified in the content and, when provided, the keywords submitted in the query. Because the publications do not contain formal identifiers (such as CPF numbers), very common or short names may result in less precise associations or content unrelated to the queried individual. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.

pessoas-exposicao-esportiva.description: This dataset identifies direct and indirect links between the respondent and institutions within the sports environment, including clubs, federations, confederations, and other entities related to sports activities. The data provided allows for the analysis of institutional relationships, roles played, level of closeness of the link, and activity status, and may also include indirect associations through family or corporate relationships, when available in the sources. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

pessoas-historico-de-dados-basicos.description: This dataset returns the history of changes to an individual's registration information with the Brazilian Federal Revenue Service, including name changes and CPF (Brazilian taxpayer ID) status over time. This information allows for temporal analyses applicable to credit models, background check processes, and registration validations in onboarding journeys. The history only considers initial registration information and changes that occurred after reaching the age of majority (18 years), not returning data for CPF numbers of minors or documents not covered by the internal database. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

pessoas-historico-escolar-e-academico.description: A dataset that returns consolidated information about the educational and academic history of the person consulted, including indicators of educational level, affiliation with higher education, and records associated with academic training. The return combines declared data, public records, and information inferred from multiple sources and statistical correlations. In cases of inferred information, the record detail explicitly indicates this condition in the institution field, ensuring transparency in data interpretation. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

pessoas-historico-politico-familiar.description: This dataset generates a timeline with information about the political participation of family members of the individual being consulted, including aggregations that allow for the identification of involvement in different regions, elected positions, and political parties. The data enables the analysis of the level of political influence and exposure of the family as a whole. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-informacoes-financeiras-de-famil.description: This dataset returns aggregated financial information about the surveyed individual's family unit, allowing for the assessment of income composition, primary income source, and estimates of household spending and disposable income. For classification purposes, an individual is considered the head of household when they contribute 70% or more of the total income, while financial dependents are those contributing less than 10%, including minors and individuals in situations of economic dependency. The data provided supports economic analyses, risk modeling, and financial capacity assessments. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic and Financial documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-informacoes-financeiras.description: This dataset returns consolidated financial information for the individual being consulted, combining statistical inferences and public data to provide a comprehensive view of income, assets, and tax return history. The return includes different income estimates calculated using distinct methodologies, as well as an estimate of the individual's total assets. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic and Financial documentation.
priceTable: NO INFORMATION, 1/2 TO 1 SM, FROM 1 TO 1.5 SM, UP TO 2 SM, 2 TO 4 SM, 4 TO 10 SM, 10 TO 20 SM, ABOVE 20 SM
NO INFORMATION, 0 TO 1 SM, 1 TO 2 SM, 2 TO 3 SM, 3 TO 5 SM, 5 TO 7 SM, 7 TO 10 SM, 10 TO 15 SM, 15 TO 20 SM, OVER 20 SM

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-licencas-e-autorizacoes.description: This dataset returns information about licenses and authorizations associated with the consulted individual, generally linked to the exercise of regulated economic activities, especially in the context of self-employment. The return includes records issued by official bodies, when available, and may not contain data for CPF numbers (Brazilian individual taxpayer registration numbers) that do not have regulatory requirements associated with their professional activity. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-nivel-de-envolvimento-politico.description: This dataset consolidates information related to the political involvement of the respondent and returns a normalized total score, allowing for the relative classification of the level of political involvement on a single scale. The score calculation considers factors such as donations to electoral campaigns, direct participation in previous elections, and current holding of public office. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-passagens-pela-web.description: This dataset returns aggregated information about an individual's web browsing history, considering frequency, diversity of contexts, and temporal attributes associated with the identifications made in BigDataCorp's processes. The data provided supports analyses of digital presence, behavior, and activity over time. For more information on context, concepts, and applications related to digital behavior, please refer to the Behavior category documentation.
priceTable: Establishes a threshold with the passed value that determines the minimum number of identical associations a document must have to be counted as a pass in the aggregation fields. NumberOfEmails, NumberOfPhones, NumberOfAddresses, NumberOfIpAddresses and NumberOfDevices.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-premios-e-certificacoes.description: This dataset gathers aggregated and detailed information about awards received and certifications obtained by the person consulted. The return includes different types of recognition, including institutional, academic, or private awards, as well as professional, technical, or compliance certifications, when identified in public sources. The data is organized into separate lists for awards and certifications, allowing a structured view of the recognitions associated with the entity. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.
priceTable: Name of the organization that awarded the prize.

filters.values: Any name or part of the name of the award.

filters.description: Name of the organization that awarded the prize.

filters.values: Any name or part of the name of the certification (e.g., PMP, ISO-27001)

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-presenca-em-cobranca.description: This dataset indicates an individual's presence in or involvement with debt collection processes, based on the identification of instances of contact, collection attempts, or exposure to credit recovery mechanisms. The return does not provide information on the debt amount, the creditor, or the nature of the obligation, only the existence of debt collection within a specific period. In addition to the total number of occurrences, the dataset provides consolidated temporal indicators, such as the number of consecutive months in collection and the volume of occurrences in the last 3, 6, and 12 months. All temporal indicators are calculated dynamically based on the query's reference date, when provided. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-presenca-online-familiar.description: This dataset returns information related to the online presence of the respondent's family group, considering the presence and activity of family members on digital buying and selling platforms. The data allows for the analysis of digital behavior patterns, levels of digital inclusion, and the degree of presence of the family unit in online marketplaces. The information is consolidated at the family level, supporting behavioral analyses, segmentations, and models that consider the group's digital context as a whole. For more information on context, applications, and use cases related to digital behavior, please refer to the Behavior category documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-prestadores-de-servicos-eleitora.description: This dataset gathers information on contracts, service provision, and supplies related to election campaigns, involving the consulted entity and service providers or political candidates. The data includes details of each contract, such as the politician or party involved, contracted values, and information associated with the candidacy. For interpretation purposes, the data includes both services rendered and received by the entity, allowing for analysis of the direction of the contractual relationship within the electoral context. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-probabilidade-de-negativacao.description: This dataset indicates the probability of an individual being in default or having a negative credit rating, based on the analysis of public signals associated with their financial behavior. The return consists of a binary indicator, calculated by a statistical and machine learning model, that identifies patterns historically correlated with default. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-propriedades-industriais.description: This dataset returns information about trademarks and patents associated with the consulted CPF (Brazilian taxpayer ID), including distinct lists for each asset type and consolidated indicators such as total quantity, countries of registration, and average duration of extraordinary terms. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic and Financial documentation.
priceTable: Define the type of asset being consulted (trademarks or patents).

filters.description: Define the type of asset being consulted (trademarks or patents).
filters.values: For trademarks, add {brands} after the dataset. Ex: industrial_property{brands}. For patents, add {patents} after the dataset. Ex: industrial_property{patents}

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-risco-financeiro-familiar.description: This dataset consolidates financial, professional, and debt exposure indicators for the immediate family members of the person being surveyed, allowing for a broader view of financial risk within the family context. The analysis considers not only the individual but also information related to parents, spouse, and children, reflecting the impact of the family's financial situation on the consolidated risk score. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-risco-financeiro.description: This dataset consolidates economic, professional, and debt exposure indicators to estimate an individual's financial risk. By combining information such as estimated income, assets, professional affiliations, shareholdings, recent debt collection history, and receipt of government assistance, the dataset returns a score and a financial risk level, allowing for quick and standardized analyses. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-servidores-publicos.description: This dataset gathers aggregated and detailed information about the individual's links to public administration, allowing for the identification of positions held, agencies of activity, and salary records over time. The result consolidates historical and current data on performance as a public servant, complementing the understanding of professional history in governmental contexts. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.
priceTable: Name of the public body or entity

filters.description: Name of the public body or entity

pessoas-telefones-de-pessoas-relacionada.description: This dataset returns phone numbers associated with people related to the queried individual, with attributes for classification, validation, relationship, and prioritization. The results allow for the analysis of contacts linked to family members, partners, colleagues, or other types of relationships, supporting network analysis, segmentation, and automated decision-making. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.
priceTable: Restricts callbacks to phone numbers of people who have the specified type of relationship.

filters.description: Type of relationship between the person being consulted and the phone number holder.

pessoas-telefones.description: This dataset returns phone numbers associated with the queried person, with classification, validation, and prioritization attributes that support contact analysis, segmentation, data modeling, and automated decision-making. The return includes individual information for the identified phone numbers and consolidated aggregate indicators. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

pessoas-turnover-profissional.description: This dataset consolidates aggregated indicators on the professional turnover of the person surveyed, considering the frequency, duration, and variation of employment relationships over time. The feedback provides a summarized and analytical view of the history of professional changes, allowing for the evaluation of patterns of stability or high turnover without the need to individually analyze each identified employment relationship. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Professionals documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-veiculos-associados-a-pessoa.description: This dataset returns information about vehicles associated with the person being searched, including cars, motorcycles, trucks, and other types. The links between individuals and vehicles are mostly inferred from advertisements published on online buying and selling portals and do not necessarily imply ownership of the vehicle by the individual. In many cases, the records represent vehicles that the person has already sold, is advertising to third parties, or simply brokered the transaction for. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Vehicles documentation.
priceTable: Vehicle code in the FIPE table

filters.values: Any keyword related to the model.

filters.description: Vehicle code in the FIPE table

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

processos-processos-do-cade.description: This dataset returns information about the procedural progress of cases analyzed or already processed by the Administrative Council for Economic Defense (CADE), including process identification data, type, interested parties, records, protocols, and progress associated with decisions related to the defense of economic order. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Other Processes documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

produtos-ficha-tecnica.description: A dataset that gathers technical and supplementary information associated with products, organized in a hierarchical structure that consolidates general item data and specific details by capture source. The return may include primary and alternative identifiers, as well as technical characteristics, physical specifications, nutritional information, active ingredients, editorial data, or other relevant attributes, depending on the product type and availability from the sources. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

produtos-imagens-do-produto.description: This dataset gathers information about current and historical images associated with products, captured from multiple sources. The output is structured hierarchically, consolidating general product data, aggregated indicators of image availability by source, and historical details of captures made, including volume and recurrence over time. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

produtos-notas-e-avaliacoes.description: This dataset gathers information about ratings and reviews associated with the product being consulted, based on consolidated reviews captured from different sources. The result presents aggregated indicators, such as volume of reviews, best and worst ratings, variations over time, and review content, in addition to consolidated and detailed metrics by source, allowing for historical and comparative analysis of the product's reputation. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Reputation documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

produtos-produtos-relacionados.description: This dataset gathers information about products related to the searched item, based on the identification of associations observed in different data sources. The return consolidates indicators by source, such as the total volume of related products and the number of items belonging to the same category, in addition to detailing the types of relationships identified, such as recommended products, products also viewed, or products also purchased. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

veiculos-dados-historicos-de-placa-de-ve.description: This dataset returns registration and historical information associated with a vehicle license plate, including data such as make, model, year, color, registered alerts, and the history of the plate's links to different vehicles over time. The query uses a historical database with data up to July 2021; Mercosur standard license plates can be entered, and will be automatically converted to the old model for query purposes. Newer vehicles, registered after this period, may not have available information. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

bodyParams.name: Limit
bodyParams.description: Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

pessoas-informacoes-socio-demograficas.description: This dataset returns socio-demographic estimates attributed to an individual based on public statistical research and population surveys. The information is inferred from geographic location, population profile, and aggregate characteristics of the region associated with the individual, representing statistical approximations and not individual statements. The returned data is organized into independent demographic records, reflecting specific segments of surveys or statistical databases, and may vary according to origin, level of aggregation, and geographic scope. For more information on business context, applications, and usage criteria, please refer to the Socio-Demographic documentation.
